SAKURAMOD-REFLECTION_POWER.title: Reflection
SAKURAMOD-REFLECTION_POWER.description: The next time an enemy attack hits you, reflect half of that attack's damage, rounded up.
SAKURAMOD-REFLECTION_POWER.smartDescript: Reflect half of the next enemy attack.
SAKURAMOD-STRONG_REFLECTION_POWER.title: Reflection
SAKURAMOD-STRONG_REFLECTION_POWER.descri: The next time an enemy attack hits you, reflect all of that attack's damage.
SAKURAMOD-LUCID_GUARD_POWER.title: Lucid Guard
SAKURAMOD-LUCID_GUARD_POWER.description: The next attack damage you take this turn is capped.
SAKURAMOD-LUCID_PIERCE_POWER.title: Lucid
SAKURAMOD-LUCID_PIERCE_POWER.description: Your next Attack this turn ignores enemy Block.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FROSTBITE_POWER.title: Frostbite
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FROSTBITE_POWER.descrip: Every 10 Frostbite increases attack damage received by 10%. At turn start, Frostbite is halved.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_FROSTBITE_POWER.smartDe: Increases attack damage received by {Amount}%. At turn start, Frostbite is halved.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_BURN_POWER.title: Burn
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_BURN_POWER.description: After receiving attack damage from a Fire card, lose HP equal to Burn.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_BURN_POWER.smartDescrip: After Fire card attacks, lose {Amount} HP.
SAKURAMOD-WIND_ELEMENT_POWER.title: Wind
SAKURAMOD-WIND_ELEMENT_POWER.description: Wind elements played this turn. Talisman effect: draw 1 card.
SAKURAMOD-WIND_ELEMENT_POWER.smartDescri: Wind elements this turn. Talisman effect: draw 1 card.
SAKURAMOD-WATER_ELEMENT_POWER.title: Water
SAKURAMOD-WATER_ELEMENT_POWER.descriptio: Water elements played this turn. Talisman effect: deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-WATER_ELEMENT_POWER.smartDescr: Water elements this turn. Talisman effect: deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-FIRE_ELEMENT_POWER.title: Fire
SAKURAMOD-FIRE_ELEMENT_POWER.description: Fire elements played this turn. Talisman effect: deal 6 damage to a random enemy.
SAKURAMOD-FIRE_ELEMENT_POWER.smartDescri: Fire elements this turn. Talisman effect: deal 6 damage to a random enemy.
SAKURAMOD-EARTH_ELEMENT_POWER.title: Earth
SAKURAMOD-EARTH_ELEMENT_POWER.descriptio: Earth elements played this turn. Talisman effect: gain 5 Block.
SAKURAMOD-EARTH_ELEMENT_POWER.smartDescr: Earth elements this turn. Talisman effect: gain 5 Block.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_POWE: Attack damage dealt is modified this turn. Removed at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_TEMPORARY_DEXTERITY_POW: Block gained from cards is modified this turn. Removed at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_COSTUME_POWER.title: Dream Costume
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_COSTUME_POWER.descriptio: The first Temporary card you play each turn costs 1 less.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_COST_REDUCTION_POWER.de: A tracked card costs 1 less this turn.
SAKURAMOD-RECORD_POWER.title: Record
SAKURAMOD-RECORD_POWER.description: HP and Block are recorded. The next Record sets your HP and Block to the recorded values.
SAKURAMOD-RECORD_POWER.smartDescription: Recorded HP {RecordedHp:diff()} and Block {RecordedBlock:diff()}. The next Record replays them and removes this.
SAKURAMOD-REPAIR_REGENERATION_POWER.desc: Your [gold]Regeneration[/gold] no longer decreases at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-BLESSING_OF_THE_NAMELESS_BOOK_: At the start of your turn, a Clear Card in hand gains Release this turn. The first time each turn you play a Released card, trigger this again.
SAKURAMOD-TALISMAN_COMBO_POWER.title: Talisman Combo
SAKURAMOD-TALISMAN_COMBO_POWER.descripti: Elements played this turn trigger talisman effects or draw based on their sequence.
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_TALISMAN_POWER.title: Syaoran Talisman
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_TALISMAN_POWER.descrip: For each Element you play during the rest of this turn, trigger its talisman effect.
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_BOND_POWER.title: Syaoran Bond
SAKURAMOD-SYAORAN_BOND_POWER.description: Played Transparent Cards gain a random missing Element this turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLOCK_COUNTRY_ALICE_POWER.desc: Record damage dealt and Block gained by Temporary cards. After the first record, create Reading at the start of your next turn.
SAKURAMOD-FALSE_DAILY_LIFE_POWER.title: False Daily Life
SAKURAMOD-FALSE_DAILY_LIFE_POWER.descrip: Cards gaining Temporary deal damage to a random enemy. Temporary cards removed from combat grant Block.
SAKURAMOD-FALSE_DAILY_LIFE_POWER.smartDe: Temporary grants hit. Temporary removal grants Block.
SAKURAMOD-GROWING_MAGIC_POWER.title: Growing Magic
SAKURAMOD-GROWING_MAGIC_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you [gold]Stabilize[/gold] a card, gain Strength.
SAKURAMOD-DREAMS_END_POWER.title: Dream's End
SAKURAMOD-DREAMS_END_POWER.description: Whenever a [red]Temporary[/red] card is removed from combat, draw {Cards:diff()} additional card at the start of your next turn.
SAKURAMOD-DREAMS_END_POWER.smartDescript: Temporary removal adds extra draw next turn.
SAKURAMOD-NEW_PAGE_POWER.title: New Page
SAKURAMOD-NEW_PAGE_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Stabilize[/gold] a card, draw cards.
SAKURAMOD-NEW_PAGE_BLOCK_POWER.title: New Page+
SAKURAMOD-NEW_PAGE_BLOCK_POWER.descripti: Whenever you [gold]Stabilize[/gold] a card, draw cards and gain {Block:diff()} Block.
SAKURAMOD-NEW_PAGE_BLOCK_POWER.smartDesc: Stabilize draws cards and gains {Block:diff()} Block.
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_SURGE_POWER.title: Magic Surge
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_SURGE_POWER.description: Each turn, Sakura's overflowing magic makes the first Manifest create additional Clear Cards.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_BOND_POWER.title: Kero Bond
SAKURAMOD-KERO_BOND_POWER.description: Your maximum hand size is increased. The first Clear Card you play each turn draws cards.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_BOND_POWER.smartDescripti: Max hand size up. First Clear Card draws.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_DESIGN_POWER.title: Tomoyo Design
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_DESIGN_POWER.descriptio: The next Clear Card you play gains Release.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_BOND_POWER.title: Tomoyo Bond
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_BOND_POWER.description: Every 2 Clear Cards you play grants Energy.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_BLOCK_NEXT_TURN_POWER.d: At the start of your next turn, gain Block.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_DRAW_NEXT_TURN_POWER.de: At the start of your next turn, draw cards.
SAKURAMOD-PROMISE_MANIFEST_POWER.title: Promise
SAKURAMOD-PROMISE_MANIFEST_POWER.descrip: At the start of your next turn, if you did not lose HP, Manifest cards.
SAKURAMOD-PROMISE_MANIFEST_POWER.smartDe: Next turn: Manifest if HP was not lost.
SAKURAMOD-DREAMING_POWER.title: Dreaming
SAKURAMOD-DREAMING_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, Manifest cards.
SAKURAMOD-GRAVITATION_HOLD_POWER.title: Gravitation Hold
SAKURAMOD-GRAVITATION_HOLD_POWER.descrip: Cards that would enter your discard pile return to your hand instead.
SAKURAMOD-MIRAGE_IMAGE_POWER.title: Mirage Image
SAKURAMOD-MIRAGE_IMAGE_POWER.description: The next time you would take attack damage, reduce it.
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_AWAKENING_POWER.title: Magic Awakening
SAKURAMOD-MAGIC_AWAKENING_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, Manifest Clear Cards.
SAKURAMOD-STAR_WAND_POWER.title: Star
SAKURAMOD-STAR_WAND_POWER.description: Released cards build Star. At 2 Star, draw 1 card, gain 1 Energy, and lose 2 Star.
SAKURAMOD-TIME_STOP_POWER.title: Time
SAKURAMOD-TIME_STOP_POWER.description: You will take an extra turn before enemies act.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_RESONANCE_POWER.desc: At end of turn, choose a Temporary card in combat and [gold]Stabilize[/gold] it.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_RESONANCE_POWER.smar: Choose a Temporary card to Stabilize.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_COST_REDUCTION_UNTIL_PL: Tuned cards cost less until they are played.
Tuned cards cost less until played.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_CATALOG_POWER.title: Catalog
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_CATALOG_POWER.descripti: You have added {Catalog:diff()}/{Total:diff()} Transparent Card types to your [gold]Catalog[/gold] this combat.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SLEEP_POWER.title: Sleep
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SLEEP_POWER.description: Skips action. Removed when taking attack damage.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_SLEEP_POWER.smartDescri: Skips action and wakes on attack damage.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_MAGIC_CHARGE_POWER.des: At 10 charge, the next eligible card spends 10 charge for its Extra effect.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_CREATE_POWER.title: Create
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_CREATE_POWER.descripti: After combat victory, obtain additional random relic rewards.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_RETURN_POWER.title: Return
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_RETURN_POWER.descripti: When this expires, restore recorded HP and Block, remove new powers, and reset recorded powers still present.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_DREAM_POWER.title: Dream
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_DREAM_POWER.descriptio: Temporary Sakura cards in combat revert to their original Clow cards at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_DREAM_POWER.smartDescr: Dream conversions revert at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_DARK_POWER.title: Dark
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_DARK_POWER.description: At end of turn, you may Exhaust cards from your hand. If you Exhaust any, gain 1 Energy next turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_DARK_POWER.smartDescri: End of turn: Exhaust up to {Amount}.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_DARK_SAKURA_POWER.desc: At end of turn, Exhaust your hand and replace it with upgraded random Clow cards in your discard pile.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_DARK_SAKURA_POWER.smar: End of turn: replace hand with upgraded Clow cards.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SHIELD_WARD_POWER.desc: At the start of your turn, gain Block.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_JUMP_POWER.title: Jump
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_JUMP_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, remove random debuffs from yourself.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_JUMP_POWER.smartDescri: Start of turn: remove {Amount} random debuff(s).
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SWEET_POWER.title: Sweet
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SWEET_POWER.descriptio: At the start of your turn, heal based on missing HP.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SWEET_POWER.smartDescr: Start of turn: heal {Amount}% missing HP.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_VOICE_POWER.title: Voice
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_VOICE_POWER.descriptio: At the start of your turn, add The Voice to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_VOICE_POWER.smartDescr: Start of turn: add {Amount} The Voice.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_EARTHY_POWER.title: Earthy
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_EARTHY_POWER.descripti: Whenever you play an Earthy card, gain 4 Block. Decreases at end of turn unless made permanent.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_EARTHY_PERMANENT_POWER: Earthy no longer decreases at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_FIREY_POWER.title: Firey
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_FIREY_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you play a Firey card, ALL enemies lose 3 HP. Decreases at end of turn unless made permanent.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_FIREY_POWER.smartDescr: Firey cards make enemies lose HP.
Firey no longer decreases at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_WATERY_POWER.title: Watery
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_WATERY_POWER.descripti: Whenever you play 2 Watery cards, gain 1 Energy. Decreases at end of turn unless made permanent.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_WATERY_PERMANENT_POWER: Watery no longer decreases at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_WINDY_POWER.title: Windy
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_WINDY_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you play 2 Windy cards, draw 1 card. Decreases at end of turn unless made permanent.
Windy no longer decreases at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_WAVE_POWER.title: Wave
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_WAVE_POWER.description: Whenever you play an Attack, gain Block.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_BIG_POWER.title: Big
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_LITTLE_POWER.title: Little
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_LITTLE_POWER.descripti: Attack damage taken is reduced by 33%.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_FLY_POWER.title: Fly
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_FLY_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, draw cards.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_GLOW_POWER.title: Glow
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_GLOW_POWER.description: If you have Sealed Book, gain Magic Charge at the start of your turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_GLOW_POWER.smartDescri: Start of turn: gain {Amount} Magic Charge.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_MOVE_POWER.title: Move
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_MOVE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, add Empty Spell to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_MOVE_POWER.smartDescri: Start of turn: add {Amount} Empty Spell.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_LOCK_POWER.title: Lock
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_LOCK_SAKURA_POWER.desc: Extra effects do not spend Magic Charge.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_LOCK_SAKURA_POWER.smar: Extra effects are free for {Amount} turn(s).
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_LOOP_POWER.title: Loop
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_LOOP_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, draw cards, then discard cards.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_LOOP_POWER.smartDescri: Start of turn: draw {Amount}, discard up to {Amount}.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_LOOP_SAKURA_POWER.desc: Whenever you discard a card, draw cards.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_LIGHT_POWER.title: Light
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_LIGHT_POWER.descriptio: Your maximum hand size is increased by 2. Void no longer costs Energy when drawn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_LIGHT_POWER.smartDescr: Max hand size +2. Void does not cost Energy when drawn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TWIN_POWER.title: Twin
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TWIN_POWER.description: The next Clow card you play each turn is played twice.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TWIN_POWER.smartDescri: The next {Amount} Clow card(s) each turn are played twice.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TWIN_SAKURA_POWER.desc: Clow cards cost more this combat and are played additional times.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TWIN_SAKURA_POWER.smar: Clow cards cost {Amount} more and play {Amount} extra time(s).
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_FLOAT_POWER.title: Float
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_FLOAT_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you draw a card, gain Block.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_FLOAT_SAKURA_POWER.des: At the start of your turn, gain Dexterity.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_FREEZE_POWER.title: Freeze
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_FREEZE_POWER.descripti: Skips action. Removed at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TIME_POWER.title: Time
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SILENT_PENDING_POWER.d: At the start of your next turn, you cannot play Attack cards that turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SILENT_NO_ATTACK_POWER: You cannot play Attack cards this turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SLEEP_POWER.title: Sleep
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SLEEP_POWER.descriptio: Non-bosses skip actions. If this expires naturally, heal to full and gain 2 Weak. Removed when taking unblocked damage.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_CERBERUS_MARK_POWER.de: Takes 25% more attack damage. Removed at the start of its turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_NOTHING_POWER.title: Nothing
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_NOTHING_POWER.descript: Clow and Sakura cards cost 0 and Exhaust. Whenever one is played, gain Block and make ALL enemies lose HP. Unless upgraded, removes a random other deck card after combat.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_NOTHING_POWER.smartDes: Clow/Sakura cards cost 0 and Exhaust. Played Clow/Sakura: gain {Block} Block and ALL enemies lose {Damage} HP. Unless upgraded, remove 1 other deck card after combat.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_HOPE_POWER.title: Hope
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_HOPE_POWER.description: All your normal damage and Block are doubled.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_HOPE_POWER.smartDescri: Normal damage and Block are doubled.
When you play a Clow or Sakura card, it has a chance to Exhaust.
Clow/Sakura cards have a {Chance}% chance to Exhaust when played.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_POW: Attack damage dealt is modified this turn. Removed at end of turn.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_LOS: Attack damage dealt is reduced this turn. Removed at end of turn.
